name: Plusminus
summary: Physics-based action puzzle game about magnetism, shown at GDC Experimental gameplay workshop.

name: Hullaballoon
summary: An augmented reality game about popping balloons on a rock-climbing wall.

name: Toywatch
summary: An augmented reality game about smacking digital beach toys on a physical trampoline.

name: Jumpball
summary: A competitive multiplayer augmented reality trampoline version of Pong.

name: Shadowlings
summary: Climb on a rock-climbing wall to lead adorable fluffy creatures back to home.

name: ValoApp
summary: Mobile app for Valo Motion games, including saving and sharing game videos and competing on leaderboards.

name: Garden
summary: Personal game project for the selected few people who enjoy gardening, maths, and roguelike games.

name: YouSort
summary: A small tool to help sorting lists with subjective criteria.

name: Timeline Card Game
summary: A card game for high school history students and teachers in Québec, following the local study program.

name: Frozen Force
summary: Website for a small e-Sports team with player profiles, records of past games, and some additonal data insights.

name: Site Folk
summary: A guide website and community hub for a game community.

name: Helsingin Seurakunta
summary: Mobile tool for the logistics of graveyards and mortuaries across Finland.

name: Ohjaustaverkossa.fi
summary: Social guidance service for young people in Finland, connecting them with multidisciplinary teams of social workers.

name: Oma Häme
summary: Maintenance tickets and accessibility improvements for the website of Kanta-Häme county, Finland.

name: Lotu
summary: Public service for people with low-income to seek and apply for funding for small vacations.

name: Lapha.fi
summary: Implemented translations for three Sami languages and did accessibility improvements across the site.

name: Famine
summary: Location-based mobile game about surviving famine in 1800s Finland.

name: Sockoff
summary: A game jam party game about being a sock in a laundry machine and avoiding getting wet

name: Breed-a-Fluff
summary: A jam game about fluffball genetics.

name: Save Game Jam
summary: Mobile game about removing plastic from the ocean.

name: Lättyyn!
summary: Physics-based game about using motion controls to throw pancakes at your opponent face.

name: This portfolio!
summary: Personal portfolio for showcasing my important and less important projects.
